severityMarkers: Closure residue survives in post-briefing and ride-out beats
audits.selfCheck: Re-read scene endings for F7 and the chapter cleared that check; F5 was tested scene by scene and stayed unresolved rather than collapsing into warmth or consensus.

findings.line: Jaina swallowed.
findings.reason: Standalone swallow beat is generic, interchangeable, and does no character-specific work beyond labeling strain.

findings.line: The rider swallowed once.
findings.reason: This is the guide's exact generic-beat pattern: a bare swallow beat that could belong to anyone in the scene.

findings.line: Jaina heard her own gear more clearly: a pack strap at her shoulder, the sending stone knocking at her hip, the staff butt tapping her stirrup leather when the road jarred.
findings.deletionTest: Her own gear came through more clearly: a pack strap at her shoulder, the sending stone knocking at her hip, the staff butt tapping her stirrup leather when the road jarred.
findings.reason: The filter verb routes direct sound through awareness instead of giving the sounds directly.
findings.suggestedFix: Her own gear came through more clearly: a pack strap at her shoulder, the sending stone knocking at her hip, the staff butt tapping her stirrup leather when the road jarred.

findings.line: Jaina almost looked at her.
findings.reason: The hedge weakens the action instead of committing to a direct physical beat.

findings.line: She knew the pulse before she touched it.
findings.deletionTest: The pulse was unmistakable before she touched it.
findings.reason: The cognition verb is scaffolding; the sentence lands more directly when the pulse itself carries the information.
findings.suggestedFix: The pulse was unmistakable before she touched it.

findings.line: She heard the weariness in the single word, and under it the teacher who already knew what sort of answer this was from her.
findings.deletionTest: The word came out worn, and beneath it her old teacher was already there, braced for this answer from her.
findings.reason: The sentence stacks two filter verbs, turning both perception and inference into narration scaffolding.
findings.suggestedFix: The word came out worn, and beneath it her old teacher was already there, braced for this answer from her.

findings.line: Kel'Thuzad's room flashed up in her mind with such force she almost missed a rut.
findings.deletionTest: Kel'Thuzad's room flashed up in her mind with such force she missed a rut.
findings.reason: The hedge softens the interruption instead of letting the memory hit with full force.
findings.suggestedFix: Kel'Thuzad's room flashed up in her mind with such force she missed a rut.

findings.line: That was the offense of it.
findings.whatItRestates: Eastweald's ordinary working-road details immediately after Caer Darrow's butcher rooms.
findings.reason: The sentence translates the image's meaning instead of trusting the ordinary-country details to carry the violation.

findings.line: That made them land harder.
findings.reason: It explains the tonal effect the reader already got from Sylvanas's level delivery.

findings.line: That, too, was true now, and too late to make anything easier.
findings.whatItRestates: "No," Jaina said more quietly. "I know that."
findings.reason: The narration subtitles the emotional cost already present in Jaina's answer and Antonidas's line.

findings.line: The horror lived in how often what he was able to move arrived after the moment that needed moving had passed.
findings.whatItRestates: He would. The horror lived in how often what he was able to move arrived after the moment that needed moving had passed.
findings.reason: The sentence explains Antonidas's chronic slowness after the dialogue has already established it.
findings.suggestedFix: Too often, what he could move arrived late.

findings.line: No absolution in it. No open condemnation either.
findings.couldEndEarlierAt: Sylvanas faced forward again. "But you did tell me."
findings.reason: The pair closes the emotional loop by summarizing the tone instead of leaving Sylvanas's line to stand.

findings.line: That was all.
findings.reason: This is pure closure captioning; the exchange is stronger if it stops on Sylvanas's dialogue and gesture.

severityMarkers: Repeated noun 'road' carries human agency four times
Analytical POV cluster triggered by road/scenery agency smear
audits.dominantPattern: Pattern 5 — Objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
audits.selfCheck: Dedicated P5/P6 sweep re-read every road, silence, answer, and scenery sentence. Literal tissue-learning lines were flipped to KEEP under subject-matter defense; the road cluster remained KILL.

findings.line: Keep the rest boxed until the road stopped asking for miles and answers at the same time.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: The miles ahead plus Jaina's own need to answer Sylvanas and keep moving.
findings.reason: Infrastructure is made to ask questions; the pressure belongs to travel demands and Jaina's own mental load.
findings.suggestedFix: Keep the rest boxed until the miles and the questions stopped landing together.

findings.line: Jaina kept going before the silence could harden.
findings.subject: silence
findings.realAgent: The accumulating unsaid tension between the riders and Jaina's need to keep speaking.
findings.reason: Silence is given active pressure instead of naming the people refusing to speak and the pause stretching between them.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina kept going without letting the pause stretch.

findings.line: Jaina looked straight ahead and wished the road would offer cover instead of flat country and air.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: The absent hedges, trees, bends, or other terrain features that could shield her.
findings.reason: The road is assigned a human act of offering instead of the terrain being described concretely.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina looked straight ahead and wished for hedges, trees, anything but flat country and air.

findings.line: For a while the road gave them nothing but distance.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: The empty stretch ahead and the lack of interruption or shelter.
findings.reason: The sentence launders the emptiness of the route into a road making a choice.
findings.suggestedFix: For a while they had nothing but distance.

findings.line: Antonidas's silences had always done more work than other men's speeches.
findings.subject: silences
findings.realAgent: Antonidas deliberately using pauses as part of how he thinks and pressures a conversation.
findings.reason: The agency belongs to Antonidas, not to silence as an acting force.
findings.suggestedFix: Antonidas had always done more with silence than other men did with speeches.

findings.line: The silence that answered was longer than the others.
findings.subject: silence
findings.reason: Silence is given the human act of answering instead of naming Antonidas's pause.
findings.suggestedFix: Antonidas answered with a longer pause than before.

findings.line: All at once the road filled with the dead it had not shown them yet.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: Jaina's own inference from the relay, the northbound traffic, and the ordinary people she'd passed.
findings.reason: Scenery is made to withhold and reveal knowledge the POV character is actually assembling for herself.
findings.suggestedFix: All at once she saw the dead in every mile behind them.

findings.line: The words came faster now because the shape of the problem had become one the road could use.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: Jaina and the immediate southbound mission finally having a concrete, actionable logistics problem.
findings.reason: The road is made to use a plan instead of the characters and mission conditions being named as the users of that narrowed problem.
findings.suggestedFix: The words came faster now because the problem had finally taken a shape she could use on the road.

severityMarkers: A2 caption stacks recur in confrontation, recall, and close
Tier A and Tier B seep co-occur in the final ride-out paragraph
audits.selfCheck: POV register established as fast, exact, method-driven Jaina. Tier B kills were limited to sentences that sounded more polished and thematic than her in-body thought stream.

findings.line: That was the offense of it.
findings.povMismatch: A verdict-tag fragment captions the country-road image instead of staying inside Jaina's sensory experience.
findings.reason: This is a pure interpretive fragment appended after the concrete paragraph.

findings.line: There it was.
findings.povMismatch: The fragment works like a caption over Sylvanas's line rather than a concrete reaction from Jaina.
findings.reason: Verdict-tag fragment: a compressed interpretive label after the dialogue beat.

findings.line: Short, clean, unbearable.
findings.povMismatch: The triple-fragment slogan reads like a caption pinned over Sylvanas's answer rather than Jaina's active thought.
findings.reason: This is a thesis-fragment stack with headline rhythm.

findings.line: No absolution in it. No open condemnation either.
findings.povMismatch: The two fragments summarize the exchange from above instead of staying with the bare fact of Sylvanas's line.
findings.reason: Two-sentence slogan stack compresses theme into caption voice.

findings.line: No title. No council. No distance.
findings.povMismatch: The fragment stack turns Antonidas's plea into an epigraph-like summary instead of a lived perception.
findings.reason: Three clipped fragments form a thesis-caption pair/trio rather than in-scene thought.
findings.suggestedFix: He asked as her teacher, not her archmage.

findings.line: The horror lived in how often what he was able to move arrived after the moment that needed moving had passed.
findings.povMismatch: Jaina can think sharply about Antonidas being late, but this abstract, polished sentence sounds written about the pattern rather than thought inside it.
findings.reason: Conceptual compression outruns Jaina's immediate in-body register during an active ride and live sending-stone call.
findings.suggestedFix: Too often, what he could move arrived late.

findings.line: Being right alone had a shape after all. A desk. A closed room. A man pleased to find himself mirrored.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence and fragments announce the chapter's thematic conclusion in polished caption form.
findings.reason: This is a thesis sentence followed by slogan fragments, exactly the guide's caption-stack pattern.
findings.suggestedFix: Being right alone looked too much like Kel'Thuzad: a desk, a closed room, a man pleased to find himself mirrored.

findings.line: The spacing no longer read as oversight. It read as what it was: trust still working under damage, steady enough to carry a kingdom's worth of bad news, sharp enough to keep a hand on every missing piece.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence comments on the relationship's thematic state from above instead of staying with the visible half-step and Jaina's immediate read.
findings.reason: Thematic awareness outruns moment-by-moment POV and turns the final formation image into essayed meaning.
findings.suggestedFix: The half-step was still there: trust under strain, still working, still checking every gap.

severityMarkers: Fragment-pivot negations recur in reflective beats
audits.selfCheck: The only KEEP that survived the deletion test was the Lor'themar line because both outcomes materially change the politics of the next move.

findings.line: Armed people riding hard in one direction always meant the trouble was there, not elsewhere.
findings.deletionTest: Armed people riding hard in one direction always meant the trouble was ahead.
findings.reason: Direct contrast pivot: the negative half is dead scaffolding once the sentence commits to where the trouble is.
findings.suggestedFix: Armed people riding hard in one direction always meant the trouble was ahead.

findings.line: Did not.
findings.deletionTest: The prior sentence stands without the negation fragment.
findings.reason: Fragment pivot: the negation fragment performs drama without adding new information.

findings.line: Not release.
findings.deletionTest: Only the old angle of his dry impatience, surfacing long enough to remind her he was still himself under all the pressure.
findings.reason: Fragment pivot: the sentence names what the feeling is not before finally getting to the actual descriptor.

findings.line: The window did not narrow.
findings.reason: Preamble negation primes one motion only to land on the real one in the next sentence.

findings.line: The spacing no longer read as oversight.
findings.deletionTest: It read as what it was: trust still working under damage, steady enough to carry a kingdom's worth of bad news, sharp enough to keep a hand on every missing piece.
findings.reason: Another preamble negation: the sentence rejects the false descriptor before the next sentence finally states the intended one.

audits.cleanReason: Counted every listed tic in the chapter. 'marked' appears once in a literal physical use, 'tightened' appears exactly three times with two physical uses and one emotional use, and there are zero corner-of-mouth beats, zero facial 'shifted' beats, and zero 'eased' beats. The chapter stays inside every hard cap, so no excess instance qualifies for KILL.

summary.verdictReason: 34 KILL verdicts across 4 guides: gpt-5-prose-issues (13), intent-smear (8), narrator-seep (8), negation-addiction (5). Recurring prose tics stayed under cap.
